decisions.trigger: Initial Discovery dispatch on the original prompt 'Build me a tool to visualize earthquake activity on a map.'
decisions.summary: Discovery captured the restatement, A1-A12 assumptions, IP1-IP3 inflection points, and out-of-scope list.

TD chose verb 'visualize', resolved TD-IP1 (Leaflet vendored), TD-IP2 (USGS past-day feed), TD-IP3 (size+color encoding); decomposed into 4 sections (data fetcher, map renderer, page shell, edge-case testing); authored discovery_coverage_assertions and per-section acceptance_assertions.

decisions.trigger: TD authored after sections-v1 to lock the EarthquakeEvent shape and fetchEarthquakes return contract.
decisions.summary: Async fetchEarthquakes() returns { ok:true, events:[] } | { ok:false, error:{code,message} }. EarthquakeEvent fields: id, magnitude|null, place|null, timeMs, lat, lon, depth.

decisions.trigger: TD authored after sections-v1 for the page bootstrap consumer.
decisions.summary: Section-3 calls fetchEarthquakes() on DOMContentLoaded and forwards events to section-2 mount, or shows error.message on { ok:false }.

decisions.trigger: TD authored after sections-v1 for the page-shell + map handshake.
decisions.summary: section-2 exposes mount(containerId, events) -> { markerCount } plus pure styling fns magnitudeColor / magnitudeRadius for legend reuse.

decisions.trigger: TD authored after sections-v1 to define the integrated-artifact layout edge-case-testing inspects.
decisions.summary: Entry point at index.html, vendor/leaflet/ for library, modules and styles co-located. Runtime network deps: USGS feed + OSM tiles. No backend, no runtime stubs in section-4.

decisions.trigger: Integrator-output-path mismatch between contract sketch (output/final/) and Coordinator briefing boundary (output/integration/).
decisions.summary: Implementation_path_chosen: write to output/integration/. No contract or product-code change.

decisions.trigger: Layout choice at integration root: flat vs nested js/css/ subdirs.
decisions.summary: Implementation_path_chosen: flat layout. No contract or product-code change.
12 files assembled into output/integration/; load order vendor/leaflet/leaflet.js -> data-fetcher.js -> map.js -> main.js.
22 pass + 1 pass_with_caveat + 3 not_applicable_in_static (deferred to CV); 0 fail. No runtime stubs.

decisions.trigger: All sections + integrator + edge-case-testing verified, historian artifacts written.
decisions.summary: Signaled ready_for_final_verification = true with next_steps_required listing critic_final_sweep, CV, delivery, run_report.
